@graph.name: Elvion
@graph.description: Elvion is a post-AI SEO and search marketing agency helping B2B and SaaS companies convert untapped organic demand into revenue through SEO strategy, content marketing, and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO).

@graph.name: Elvion - Convert More Demand Into Revenue
@graph.description: As SEO evolves in the post-AI world, so must the strategy. Adapt to the new era of search marketing and convert untapped demand into revenue.

@graph.name: Elvion - Convert More Demand Into Revenue
@graph.description: Elvion helps B2B and SaaS brands adapt to post-AI search and convert untapped organic demand into measurable revenue through SEO and GEO strategies.

@graph.name: Elvion SEO & GEO Services
@graph.description: Comprehensive SEO and Generative Engine Optimization services for B2B and SaaS companies looking to grow organic revenue in the post-AI search landscape.

itemOffered.name: SEO Strategy & Execution
itemOffered.description: Full-funnel SEO strategy including technical audits, keyword research, on-page optimization, and performance tracking.

itemOffered.name: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
itemOffered.description: Optimize your brand to appear in AI-generated answers from ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity.

itemOffered.name: B2B Content Marketing
itemOffered.description: High-intent content strategy and production designed to attract decision-makers and build topical authority.

itemOffered.name: Link Building & Digital PR
itemOffered.description: Acquiring high-quality editorial backlinks through digital PR, partnerships, and authority-building campaigns.
